summary: Ultra‑matrix capture of an electric show with a scorching “I’m A Man” jam and standout contributions from Jerry, Phil, Brent and Bobby.
review: Both reviewers rave about the high‑energy performance, especially the fiery rendition of “I’m A Man,” the tight masterful runs on Masterpiece, Loser and Victim, and Brent’s keyboard work alongside Hornsby’s accordion. The matrix mix is assumed solid (no complaints), though one reviewer notes a brief oddity in Jerry’s tone at the start of Stella Blue. Overall the concert is described as fun, rare and unforgettable.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 5‑star reviews praise the musical performance heavily; recording quality is not mentioned but UltraMatrix sources are generally good, leading to a high combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound; UltraMatrix mixes are typically clear and balanced, so assumed solid with no noticeable issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Starts high‑energy but a bit rough, tightens around Masterpiece and builds to the highlight “I’m A Man,” with strong mid‑set momentum before a brief stumble on Stella Blue.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Nice solo after Bruce; occasional odd tone at the beginning of Stella Blue that threw him off briefly.
band_member_comments.Phil: Very into “I’m A Man,” channeling Duck Dunn and setting a fiery tone for the song.
band_member_comments.Bob: Bobby’s guitar work is spotlighted and praised throughout the show.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent shines on B3 and answers beautifully; Hornsby adds accordion/piano flavor on several numbers.
